title: extract filter-map pattern into helper
description: chat_query (chat.rs:35-47) and message_query (message.rs:58-72) both duplicate the same Map::new() / conditional-insert / is_empty-then-Null pattern. Extract a private helper in mod.rs: fn map_to_filter(m: serde_json::Map<String,serde_json::Value>) -> serde_json::Value { if m.is_empty() { serde_json::Value::Null } else { serde_json::Value::Object(m) } }. Callers build the map then pass it through the helper, eliminating the duplicated termination block.
